articles.title: Coin Bureau Names Top Three Projects Built on Crypto Newcomer Polkadot

articles.title: DeFiance Capital Joins Bancor (BNT) Ecosystem as Strategic Advisors
articles.description: DeFi investment fund DeFiance Capital has become part of the DeFi protocol Bancor’s ecosystem and will provide advice on tokenomics, financial and institutional liquidity management in the capacity of strategic advisors. articles.title: Ripple Exploring Ways To Bring NFTs to XRP Ledger, Says CTO David Schwartz
articles.description: Ripple chief technology officer David Schwartz says the San Francisco payments company is looking at ways to bring non-fungible tokens (NFTs) to the XRP Ledger. In a new interview on Thinking Crypto, Schwartz notes that he personally has been interested in two particular ideas regarding NFTs and the space they occupy in the digital world. […]

articles.title: Bybit Launches Cardano Perpetual Contracts With Up To 25x Leverage
articles.description: Bybit Ramps Up Leverage Bybit, one of the cryptocurrency market’s largest exchanges, earlier announced it is launching perpetual contracts for three of the largest cryptocurrencies in the space. These include Cardano (ADA), Uniswap (UNI), and Polkadot (DOT), all three of which are in the top 10 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization. The contracts come with up … Continued

articles.title: Bybit adds Cardano, Polkadot, and Uniswap to its trading platform
articles.description: Leading crypto derivatives trading platform Bybit is launching three new USDT trading pairs. Going forward, Bybit users will have access to UNI, DOT, and ADA as USDT-margined perpetual contracts. Traders will be free to choose between 1x and 25x for trading the new pairs. This is the second time such additions have been made for […]

articles.title: Bybit Adds ADA, DOT and UNI to Its USDT Margined Offerings
articles.description: SINGAPORE, March 18, 2021 — Cryptocurrency derivatives exchange Bybit has announced today the arrival of three new USDT trading pairs with Cardano’s ADA, Polkadot’s DOT, and Uniswap’s UNI. The introduction of these new trading pairs is the second expansion of Bybit’s markets in as many weeks, following the arrival of the BTCUSD0625 futures contract onRead More

articles.title: How Polkadot ‘bridges’ bring cross-chain functionality to the $35b network
articles.description: Web 3, the next generation of the internet, has been envisioned by proponents to run on a fully-decentralized blockchain to create a user-friendly web wherein a user’s identity and data are their own.
